# Logs King

A marketplace platform focused on the sale of social media account credentials and logs. The platform connects buyers and sellers of accounts across various social media platforms.

Source: https://logs-king-ab7f1988.zappy5.app

---

## Rule the King Log House Marketplace — Logs King

URL: https://logs-king-ab7f1988.zappy5.app
Description: Step into the King Log House, where buyers and sellers trade social media credentials securely. Explore top accounts and reign supreme. Join the kingdom today!

Rule the King Log House Marketplace — Logs King

## Built for Serious Buyers & Sellers


Logs King isn't a casual browsing platform — it's a structured marketplace designed to connect verified sellers with motivated buyers across every major social media platform. Every feature is engineered to make transactions cleaner, faster, and more transparent.












### Multi-Platform Scope



Access logs and credentials across Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, Snapchat, and more — all from a single unified marketplace. The king log house for every platform you need.










### Curated Listings Only



Every account listing passes through quality checks before it goes live. No spam, no junk — just verified inventory ready for purchase.











### Seller Visibility



Stand out with detailed seller profiles, trust badges, and transparent transaction history — making it easier for buyers to choose you.










### Cleaner Communication



Built-in messaging keeps conversations structured and on-platform, reducing noise and helping you close deals faster.











### Market-Focused Presentation



Listings are displayed with clean, data-rich cards that highlight follower counts, engagement rates, and account age — no clutter.










### Trust-Oriented Positioning



Our platform is built around trust signals — verified badges, escrow-style holds, and review systems keep both sides accountable.
























## Marketplace Momentum You Can Trust


As the king log house in the digital marketplace space, we connect serious sellers with high-intent buyers. Our platform is engineered for scale, offering unparalleled listing exposure and streamlined transactions that turn inventory into instant opportunity.

Supported Account Categories

Monthly Buyer Searches

# A Structured Marketplace for Social Media Account Exchange


Logs King provides a professional platform where buyers and sellers connect with confidence. Our organized listing system ensures maximum visibility for your accounts and a streamlined browsing experience for potential buyers looking for quality digital assets.









Organized Listings





Maximum Visibility





Professional Presentation















## Empower Your Marketplace with Precision Tools


Logs King bridges the gap between ambitious sellers and discerning buyers across every major social platform. Our structured marketplace gives you full visibility into account quality, pricing tiers, and seller reputation so every transaction feels confident and transparent.


Whether you are scaling inventory or searching for verified profiles, the platform adapts to your workflow. Smart category filters, real‑time listing updates, and a clean dashboard keep your operations streamlined. This is the king log house where serious traders build their portfolio.









### Seller Exposure


List once and appear to thousands of verified buyers. Rank higher with transparent seller ratings and fast-fulfillment badges that build instant trust.







### Buyer Clarity


Every listing includes platform stats, account age, and follower quality indicators so you can evaluate value at a glance before you buy.







### Category Presentation


Browse organized categories across Instagram, TikTok, Twitter, and more. Each category features curated top picks and trending accounts.







### Multi‑Platform Structure


Manage listings across platforms from a single dashboard. Cross‑platform analytics help you spot demand shifts and optimize your inventory fast.















## Built for Sellers, Buyers & Marketers


Faster discovery, stronger positioning, and cleaner communication pathways — all in one polished marketplace.










### Instant Discovery


Find high-quality social media account logs in seconds. Our powerful search and filtering tools help you locate exactly what you need without the endless scrolling.









### Stronger Positioning


List your logs with detailed profiles and transparent metrics. Stand out from the competition with verified listings that build instant buyer confidence.









### Higher Professionalism


A structured marketplace elevates your entire operation. Clean communication pathways and escrow-protected transactions make every deal feel safe and premium.
















## How the Platform Works


Understanding the pathway from inquiry to connection. Our process is designed to be transparent, guiding you through every step of the marketplace experience.






1



### Initial Inquiry


Reach out with your general needs or browse the available listings. Whether you are looking to acquire or list, the first step is opening a dialogue about what you need.





2



### Marketplace Fit Discussion


We help you find the right match. Our team provides guidance on available inventory, platform compatibility, and the specifics of the vtex marketplace platform to ensure a good fit.





3



### Listing & Acquisition Guidance


Navigate the process with clarity. We walk you through the specifics of account credentials, log verification, and the structured steps to secure a transaction smoothly.





4



### Direct Contact & Follow-Up


Finalize the connection. Once the details are aligned, we facilitate the direct contact pathway and provide follow-up support to ensure everything is in order.













FAQ

## Frequently Asked Questions


Find answers about supported platforms, seller participation, and how our marketplace connects buyers and sellers across the social media landscape.









### Which social media platforms are currently supported?


Our marketplace supports accounts and logs across all major platforms including Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, Snapchat, Twitter/X, YouTube, LinkedIn, and emerging networks. Sellers can list credentials for any verified platform category, and buyers can filter by platform to find exactly what they need.









### How can I become a seller on the platform?


Joining as a seller is straightforward. Create an account, complete our verification process, and start listing your social media account credentials. Each listing undergoes a quality review to ensure marketplace integrity. Sellers benefit from our escrow system that protects both parties until the transaction is confirmed.









### What guarantees do buyers have when purchasing logs?


Every transaction on our marketplace is protected by our escrow payment system. Funds are held securely until the buyer confirms receipt and validates the account credentials. Our dispute resolution team is available 24/7 to handle any issues, and we maintain a transparent seller rating system so you can review seller history before purchasing.









### Are there professional or bulk purchase options available?


Yes, we offer tailored solutions for agencies, marketers, and professional buyers who need accounts at scale. Our dedicated account management team can arrange bulk pricing, custom platform filters, and priority support. Contact our sales team through the inquiry page to discuss your specific requirements and volume needs.









### How does this marketplace differ from other platforms?


Unlike generic marketplaces, we specialize exclusively in social media account credentials with platform-specific categorization, verified seller tiers, and a community-driven reputation system. Our platform combines the security of a modern e-commerce experience with deep category expertise, making it the trusted choice for buyers and sellers in this niche.









### How can I get in touch for custom inquiries?


You can reach our support team through the contact form on our website, via email at , or by phone at . Our team typically responds within 2 hours during business hours. For urgent matters, priority support is available to verified account holders through their dashboard.















The premier digital marketplace for premium logs and wood products. Quality sourced, sustainably delivered.

# Building the most trusted marketplace for digital accounts


Logs King was founded to bring structure, safety, and clarity to the social media account marketplace. We connect serious buyers with verified sellers across every major platform, creating a seamless experience for operators who need reliable, growth-ready digital assets.


Our platform strips away the noise. Every listing is organized for fast discovery, every transaction is backed by transparent processes, and every account is reviewed for quality. Whether you're scaling a portfolio or launching a new presence, Logs King gives you the tools and confidence to move forward.





















## Our Mission at Logs King


We are redefining the digital marketplace by making account transactions more structured, transparent, and professional for every participant — whether you're buying or selling.











### Structured Trust


We build credibility into every listing with standardized verification and clear quality signals that help buyers make informed decisions.









### Full Visibility


Every transaction is supported by clear listing details, transparent pricing, and straightforward delivery so there are no surprises.









### Professional Exchange


We elevate the marketplace experience with tools and standards designed to support serious buyers and sellers in a competitive space.















## Our Core Values


At Logs King, we believe in building a marketplace that is clear, relevant, professional, and aligned with the needs of our audience. Every decision we make is rooted in these four pillars, ensuring a seamless experience for buyers and sellers alike.








### Clarity


We prioritize transparency in every transaction. Our platform provides clear, detailed listings and straightforward communication tools so you always know exactly what you are getting.







### Relevance


We stay ahead of market trends to ensure our inventory remains fresh and in demand. From the latest social platforms to high-value account niches, we connect you with what matters most right now.







### Professionalism


We treat our marketplace with the seriousness it deserves. Our platform features escrow-backed transactions, verified seller badges, and a dedicated support team to uphold the highest standards of integrity.







### Audience Alignment


Every feature we build is designed with our community in mind. We listen to feedback and continuously refine the Logs King experience to match the evolving needs of digital account traders worldwide.













## Built for the Vtex Marketplace Ecosystem


Whether you're building influence, diversifying investments, or sourcing premium digital assets, Logs King connects the right people to the right opportunities in a structured, secure environment.











### Account Buyers


Sourcing aged, niche-relevant social profiles to accelerate brand growth. Buyers gain immediate access to vetted inventories, transparent metrics, and escrow-protected transactions.











### Account Sellers


Monetizing high-quality social assets with competitive pricing. Sellers leverage our platform to reach verified global buyers, ensuring fast liquidity and reputation-based rankings.











### Digital Marketers


Amplifying campaign reach through established account portfolios. Marketers secure bulk assets for cross-platform storytelling, bypassing organic growth bottlenecks with immediate authority.











### Online Investors


Diversifying digital portfolios with high-yield social assets. Investors treat accounts as appreciating commodities, trading on market trends within the growing king log house ecosystem.















## Trusted by the Marketplace


Real feedback from professionals who rely on Logs King for their digital inventory needs. Every review reflects our commitment to quality, transparency, and seamless transactions.











"Logs King transformed how we source verified accounts. The platform is intuitive, the vetting process is rigorous, and the support team is incredibly responsive. It's become an essential part of our digital supply chain."





M


Marcus Chen
Digital Asset Manager, GrowthHive











"As someone who operates in a niche market, finding a reliable log provider was a challenge until I discovered Logs King. The quality consistency and escrow protection give me complete peace of mind with every transaction."





S


Sarah Iqbal
Independent Marketplace Trader











"The marketplace clarity on Logs King is unmatched. Every listing is detailed, the filtering saves hours of manual searching, and the community trust signals make it the king log house for serious buyers and sellers alike."





D


David Okonkwo
E-Commerce Strategist, RevScale

# Let's Build Something Together


Whether you're looking to buy premium social media accounts, sell your logs, or explore a strategic partnership, the Logs King team is ready to connect. Reach out and take the next step.










### Email Inquiries


Drop us a message anytime. We aim to respond to all inquiries within 2-4 hours during business days.









### Direct Inquiry


Prefer a structured conversation? Use our secure form below and a specialist will reach out with tailored options.

Form Below







### Response Expectations


Our team operates globally. Expect a detailed response within one business day. Urgent requests are prioritized for verified accounts.

Fast & Reliable

















## Let's start a conversation


Whether you're looking to buy, sell, or just have a question about our marketplace, our team is ready to help. Reach out and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.

## How to Reach the King


Practical guidance for buyers, sellers, digital marketers, and investors on connecting with the marketplace.










### For Buyers


When inquiring about available accounts, please specify the platform, desired metrics, and your budget range. This helps us match you with the best inventory from our verified seller network.



Response within 2 hours









### For Sellers


Include your portfolio summary, average account quality scores, and typical inventory volume. Our team reviews all seller applications thoroughly to maintain marketplace integrity.



Verification within 24 hours









### For Partners & Investors


We welcome strategic partnerships and investment inquiries. Please provide your organization details, proposal overview, and preferred contact method for a confidential discussion.



Direct line to management



















## Ready to Start the Conversation?


Connect with Logs King today and explore premium social media account logs tailored to your needs. Our team is standing by to help you find exactly what you're looking for.

## Return Policy

URL: https://logs-king-ab7f1988.zappy5.app/return-policy
Description: Return policy - your rights for returns and exchanges

Return Policy - Logs King




































































- Products Products




- Home
- Marketplace Features
- About
- Contact
0












Products










# Return Policy


Last Updated: 6/8/2026



At Logs King, we want you to be satisfied with your purchase. This policy outlines your rights for returns and refunds.


## 1. Return Window


You may return most items within 30 days of delivery for a full refund.


- Items must be unused and in original condition

- Items must be in original packaging

- Receipt or proof of purchase required




## 2. Non-Returnable Items


- Perishable goods

- Custom or personalized items

- Digital products and opened software

- Personal hygiene products that have been opened




## 3. Damaged or Defective Items


If you receive a damaged or defective item, contact us within 48 hours for a full refund including shipping costs.


## 4. Contact Us



For returns or questions:


Email: [business_email]


Phone: [business_phone]


Address: [business_address]

## Privacy Policy

URL: https://logs-king-ab7f1988.zappy5.app/privacy
Description: Our privacy policy - how we collect, use, and protect your information

Privacy Policy

































- Products Products




- Home
- Marketplace Features
- About
- Contact
0















# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  6/8/2026



Logs King ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website [business_website] ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: Logs King

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice

## Accessibility Statement

URL: https://logs-king-ab7f1988.zappy5.app/accessibility
Description: Our accessibility statement - our commitment to digital accessibility

Accessibility Statement

































- Products Products




- Home
- Marketplace Features
- About
- Contact
0















# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  June 8, 2026



Logs King is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: Logs King

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.















The premier digital marketplace for premium logs and wood products. Quality sourced, sustainably delivered.

# Terms of Use



Last updated:  June 8, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - Logs King

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - E-commerce / Digital Marketplace provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


Logs King provides E-commerce / Digital Marketplace through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by Logs King. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information


For questions or clarifications regarding the terms of use:


- Company: Logs King

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]
